title: × leucopyrethrum rohlenae
intro: × Leucopyrethrum rohlenae, also known as the Hawk's Beard or Mountain Hawk's Beard, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of × Leucopyrethrum rohlenae include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and soothing digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
